name: LTX 2.3 IC-LoRA — image + audio to video (auto-prompt)
description:
Bring a character image to life with a voice clip. Upload an image and a reference audio (speech), describe the shot, and LTX 2.3 generates a talking video synced to the audio. An in-graph Gemma model rewrites your prompt into an LTX-optimized one (toggle "Enhance prompt with AI" off to use your text as-is).

This is the IC-LoRA / creative variant (distilled model, no identity LoRA). To keep a real person's identity (lip-synced talking head), use the ID-LoRA version (video_ltx2_3_id_lora_img_audio2vid) instead.

Set the duration to roughly match your audio clip.
author: Template - ComfyUI

exposedParameters.label: Prompt (scene / character / action / camera)
exposedParameters.default:
The fuzzy cactus creature is talking to the viewer as it grips the steering wheel with one hand, the other hand gestures naturally as it speaks. The car is moving, revealing the sunlit coastal background, static camera fixed on character, smooth side-tracking shot matching the car speed

scene: Sunlit coastal road trip, clear coastal background
character: Fuzzy cactus creature with big square sunglasses and a Hawaiian shirt
action: One hand grips the steering wheel, the other gestures naturally while talking to the camera
camera: Fixed on character, smooth side-tracking shot matching car speed

exposedParameters.label: Negative prompt
exposedParameters.default: pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly
